2170830.name: ROW: Realms Of War
2170830.description:
REALMS OF WAR GAME STORY

Eryndor

"And the world was never the same."

Enter The Fracture

The Age of Balance

There was a time when Eryndor stood whole.

A realm of emerald skies, molten veins of magic, and cities sculpted from living crystal—where spellwrights whispered stars into orbit and rune forges sang beneath mountain halls. Kingdoms rose on the twin pillars of arcana and tradition, their banners woven with power and pride.

This was the Age of Balance.

But balance is a fragile thing.

And power—true power—never sleeps.

The Eternal Scar

When the first arcanotech engines roared to life, humming with unstable fusion of spell and circuitry caused by rogue mages, the world held its breath. Scholars warned. Sages dreamed. Warlords listened only to the promise of dominion.

And then… the rift.

Not a tear in the heavens—a rupture in the very fabric of existence.

This was The Fracture.

Rifts exploded across the land, clawing open pathways to other realms.

Alien suns bled into Eryndor's sky.

Gravity wept. Time recoiled.

Forests burned. Cities drowned in darkness. The rules of reality bent—then broke.

Where once there was one world… now stood many, colliding.

The Voidborn

From these wounds in the cosmos came invaders, pilgrims, gods… and something far more ancient.

The Voidborn.

Not demons. Not myths. But far worse.

Beings of dread, born in the dimensional abyss between realms—a place where creation itself forgets its purpose, but no one really knows where they are really from.

They did not march.

They poured in waves, wearing fractal armor, wielding weapons forged from bone, metal, and fire. They do not speak. They do not rest. They do not stop. They conquer.

"Through the rifts, the Voidborn came to conquer and consume."

Civilizations collapsed in days.

Towers toppled like bones beneath giants.

Magic buckled. Tech choked on static.

Even the gods fell silent.

Yet Eryndor Endured

And yet… Eryndor endured.

From the chaos rose those who dared to hope—wandering warriors, broken legions, rogue mages, hunters of flame and steel. Not united by crown, but by instinct. By fire. By the one law that remained:

War is survival.

Skill is fate.

A blade drawn too slow is death.

A bullet fired too soon is ruin.

In the Realms of War, only those who act with precision, speed, and soul carve their names into the storm.

"Crimson rifts where shadows crawl,
Steel and spells—we faced them all."

These warriors became factions.

Factions forged new Realms.

And every Realm became a battlefield, carved from shattered worlds, echoing with ruin and rage.

Each duel is a reckoning.

Each kill, a verse in an unending hymn of fire and blood.

"Behold the Fracture—eternal scar.
Born from fire, blood, and war."

The Myth Behind the Fracture

They speak of meaning beneath the madness.

Some call it divine punishment—retribution for daring to bind magic to machine. Others believe it was no accident, but a cosmic ignition—a signal to the multiverse that Eryndor was ready to evolve… or be erased.

Among the old Elydorians, they say the Fracture is a birth canal, where dead realities mix and forge something new. Not better. Not worse. Just rawer. Truer.

Among the Voidborn, it is prophecy fulfilled.

They call it the Eternal Gate.

A holy threshold of endless war and infinite evolution of their empire.

And now, the most terrifying truth?

The Fracture is still growing.

New rifts open with every cycle.

New lands, new enemies, new powers spill forth.

And always, war follows.

No gods remain.

No kings endure.

Only warriors.

And now… You step into the fire.

"The Fracture isn't just a scar…
It's where warriors are forged."

Enter the Fracture

The shattered realms of Eryndor await. Will you rise as a warrior of legend, or become another echo in the endless storm?

What is R.O.W.?

Introducing R.O.W: An Exciting Multiplayer First and Third-Person Shooter Game!

Experience the thrill of intense multiplayer action with R.O.W. This action-packed game offers endless entertainment as players engage in fierce competitions individually or team up for a strategic advantage. Get ready to embark on thrilling missions with the ultimate goal of achieving victory. Join the excitement and dominate the battlefield in R.O.W!

Multiplayer Game Modes

Conquest – Control the area with your team to earn points over time. The more areas your team controls, the faster your team earns points.

Capture the flag – Capture the enemy flag and bring it to your base to earn points. If the enemy team captures your flag, you’ll need to retrieve it first to capture theirs.

Rush – Destroy or defend the objectives. If the attacker team runs out of reinforcements, the defender team wins.

Team Deathmatch – A battle royal between teams for the glory!

Free For All (Deathmatch) – A battle royal between players. The world is your oyster, so go all out and be victorious.

Kill Confirmed – Kill players from the opposing team and collect their dog tags to earn points. You can also collect dog tags from your team to deny points to the enemy team.

The game is free to play. However, staying alive will be challenging.

Each character has a unique skill set to handle specific (or multiple) weapons.
